response.justification: Bogdan is a strong Staff-level candidate with highly relevant recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly aligning with the agentic mindset required for this role. He brings deep expertise in high-throughput distributed systems, having built microservices handling millions of requests per second. The primary drawback is the complete absence of Python on his resume, which is a stated must-have, though his extensive polyglot background (TypeScript, C++, Java, DLang) and strong engineering fundamentals warrant a technical interview.
strengths: Direct experience building AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows.
Proven track record designing high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Strong technical leadership demonstrated through Staff-level roles, open-source platform development, and engineering workshops.
concerns: Missing Python experience, which is explicitly listed as a must-have technical skill.
Recent Staff-level position involving AI infrastructure was relatively brief (6 months).
Historically utilized niche languages (DLang) for high-performance backend systems instead of mainstream ecosystem languages.
